Variables.Name: DistanceAlgorithm
Variables.Description: The type of attenuation as a function of distance to use.

Variables.Name: CustomAttenuationCurve
Variables.Description: The custom volume attenuation curve to use.

Variables.Name: AttenuationShape
Variables.Description: The shape of the non-custom attenuation method.

Variables.Name: dBAttenuationAtMax
Variables.Description: The attenuation volume at maximum distance in decibels, used for natural attenuation method.

Variables.Name: AttenuationShapeExtents
Variables.Description: The dimensions to use for the attenuation shape. Interpretation of the values differ per shape.

Variables.Name: ConeOffset
Variables.Description: The distance back from the sound's origin to begin the cone when using the cone attenuation shape.

Variables.Name: FalloffDistance
Variables.Description: The distance over which volume attenuation occurs.
